name: bmt
description: BMT — persona-adaptive business cockpit for SMBs. Keep doing what you do best.

scripts.test: node --test tests/unit/*.test.js tests/contract/*.test.js tests/integration/*.test.js tests/eval/*.test.js tests/drills/*.test.js tests/security/*.test.js
scripts.test:ci: node --test --test-reporter=spec tests/unit/*.test.js tests/contract/*.test.js tests/integration/*.test.js tests/eval/*.test.js tests/drills/*.test.js tests/security/*.test.js
